question.text: How is the Extreme Loss Margin collected from members?

answer.text: Adjusted against total liquid assets on a real-time basis
Collected as cash before start of next trading day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The ELM is collected/adjusted against the total liquid assets of the member on a real-time basis, on the gross open position. **The Trap:** Unlike MTM which is collected before start of next day, ELM is adjusted in real-time against liquid assets. **Cross-Exam Context:** Real-time risk management is a hallmark of Indian clearing corporations. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Real-time adjustment means ELM is continuously monitored and enforced throughout the trading session.
